notes: DIFF IS TRUNCATED at ~150k (marker present). v8 found 5 distinct corrupted @Named(T/A/D) annotations — all VERIFIED in the visible diff: original @Component(...hint=X.ID) became @Named(T) etc., where T/A/D are not constants/imports => guaranteed compile failures. These match the human reference's headline (compilation failures) though the human cited 3 DIFFERENT files (TargetPlatformRepository/TychoReactorReader/DefaultMavenContext) that are NOT in the visible diff (likely past truncation). Each of v8's 5 is a serious correctly-identified compile bug with the exact fix = critical x5. points 6,7,8 ('no issue'/pre-existing TODO praise) = trivial x3. No fabrications (all cited files in changed-file list). net = 5*2 -1 = 9.
